description: Fix sleep tracker DB validation, SmartRota raw JSON rendering for staff constraints, NaturalLanguageSearch blank result cards, emoji HTML entity rendering, and audit/fix all other pages dumping raw JSON via JSON.stringify in pre tags.
steps: In backend/src/controllers/sleepTracker.controller.ts logSleep function: Add validation at the top of the try block (after extracting body fields) - if (!residentId || !sleepDate) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'residentId and sleepDate are required' }); This prevents the NOT NULL constraint violation on resident_id.

In frontend/src/pages/SmartRota.tsx: Replace the Staff Constraints panel section (around lines 236-250) that currently renders {c.message || c.description || JSON.stringify(c)} with properly formatted staff constraint cards. The backend returns objects with: user_id, staff_name, role, contract_hours, hourly_rate, hours_this_week, hoursThisWeek, contractHours, maxWeeklyHours, remainingHours, violations (string array), hasViolation (boolean). Render each as a card showing: staff_name, role (as a badge), contractHours + 'h contracted', hoursThisWeek + 'h this week', remainingHours + 'h remaining', and violations as red badges. Use green background for no violations, red/warning for violations.

In frontend/src/pages/NaturalLanguageSearch.tsx: Fix the renderResultCard function to be more robust. Add a check for resident_id field as a primary condition (since ALL backend search queries return resident_id + first_name + last_name). Also add a better generic fallback that extracts and displays key-value pairs nicely instead of raw JSON. For items with resident_id, show the resident card format even if first_name is null (use 'Unknown Resident' as fallback name). Also handle the medications array field by showing medication pills/badges.

In frontend/src/pages/NaturalLanguageSearch.tsx line 161: Replace the string '🕑' with the actual Unicode clock emoji character (use '\ud83d\udd51' or the literal emoji). This fixes the HTML entity showing as literal text instead of rendering as an emoji.

Fix raw JSON rendering in frontend/src/pages/IntergenerationalProgramme.tsx: Replace the two JSON.stringify pre blocks (safeguarding data and wellbeingImpact) with formatted card displays. For safeguarding: show dbs_required, risk_assessment_date, supervisor_required as labeled fields. For wellbeingImpact: show metrics as stat cards.

Fix raw JSON rendering in frontend/src/pages/MenuChoiceSystem.tsx: Replace dietaryProfile JSON dump with formatted display showing texture_requirement, cultural_needs, allergies, notes as labeled fields. Replace kitchenData JSON dump with formatted table/cards showing meal counts and requirements.

Fix raw JSON rendering in frontend/src/pages/DailyPurposePlanner.tsx: Replace report JSON dump with formatted engagement report showing total_sessions, avg_satisfaction, total_minutes etc. as stat cards.
Fix raw JSON rendering in frontend/src/pages/FriendshipMapper.tsx: Replace seating JSON dump with formatted card display showing table assignments and reasons.

Fix raw JSON rendering in frontend/src/pages/MusicTherapy.tsx: Replace effectivenessData JSON dump with formatted display showing session counts, avg mood improvement, most effective genres as stat cards.
Fix raw JSON rendering in frontend/src/pages/RehabGoalTracker.tsx: Replace report JSON dump with formatted progress report showing goals_count, completion_rate, milestones as stat cards.
acceptance_criteria: sleepTracker.controller.ts returns 400 error if residentId or sleepDate is missing/falsy
SmartRota staff constraints render as formatted cards with staff name, role badge, hours info, and violation badges - never raw JSON
NaturalLanguageSearch results render resident data with name, room, risk level - never blank white cards
The clock emoji on the history toggle button renders as an actual emoji character, not literal text 🕑
IntergenerationalProgramme, MenuChoiceSystem, DailyPurposePlanner, FriendshipMapper, MusicTherapy, and RehabGoalTracker no longer dump raw JSON via JSON.stringify in pre tags
All files compile cleanly: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../backend && npx tsc --noEmit
